channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: 40% Off Select Bowls & Salads — Big Value Week
item.guid: Panera Bread-40% Off Select Bowls & Salads — Big -2026-07-13
item.description: Order any select bowl or salad via the Panera app or website and save approximately 40% through July 15. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: 20% Off Your Order — Code FIREUP20
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-20% Off Your Order — Code FIREUP20-2026-07-13
item.description: Apply promo code FIREUP20 at the El Pollo Loco app or website for 20% off fire-grilled chicken meals, bowls, and salads. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: The Halal Guys: Fan Feast Meal — World Cup Watch Party Bundle
item.guid: The Halal Guys-Fan Feast Meal — World Cup Watch Party B-2026-07-13
item.description: Feed 4–5 guests with a Fan Feast that includes protein, rice, pita, toppings, and sauce packs through July 19. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Chipotle: Free Entree with $25+ Order — Big Value Week
item.guid: Chipotle-Free Entree with $25+ Order — Big Value -2026-07-13
item.description: Order $25 or more through the Chipotle app or website and receive a free entree as part of Big Value Week. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza — Now Includes Parmesan Stuffed Crust
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza — Now Includes Parmesan -2026-07-13
item.description: Get any pizza at any size for $9.99, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge, through July 26. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $9.99 Any Pizza Deal
item.description: Grab any pizza for $9.99 via the Pizza Hut app or website through July 26, now with Parmesan Stuffed Crust included. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Subway: Two Footlongs for $12.99 — Code FL1299
item.description: Use promo code FL1299 at subway.com or in the app to get two any-footlong subs for just $12.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO $5 — Buy One Sandwich/Salad/Soup, Get One for $5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO $5 — Buy One Sandwich/Salad/Soup, G-2026-07-13
item.description: Enter code BOGO5 at checkout on panerabread.com or in the app to get a second entrée for only $5. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Get a massive Luxe Cravings Box stuffed with a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips, and a drink for $5.99 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.description: Score a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT, 4-pc nuggets, Jr. fries, and a small drink for $5 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Pick a Double Cheeseburger, Bacon Double Cheeseburger, or Crispy Chicken Jr. plus 4-pc nuggets, fries, and a drink for $5 in the BK app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $7.99 Meat & 3 Box
item.description: Get a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich, three sides, and a small drink for $7.99 via the Arby's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $7 Meal Deal — 3-Piece Chicken Strip or Original Cheeseburger
item.guid: Dairy Queen-$7 Meal Deal — 3-Piece Chicken Strip or -2026-07-13
item.description: Get a 3-Piece Chicken Strip Meal Deal or Original Cheeseburger Meal Deal for $7 at DQ; upgrade to a Blizzard for $2 more. (Ongoing)

item.title: Shake Shack: App Value Menu — $2 Sodas, $4 Fries, $6 Shakes
item.guid: Shake Shack-App Value Menu — $2 Sodas, $4 Fries, $6 -2026-07-13
item.description: Order through the Shake Shack app or website for discounted sodas ($2), fries ($4), and shakes ($6) at participating locations nationwide. (Ongoing)

item.title: KFC: $10 Chicken Bucket
item.description: Pick up a 12-piece bucket of KFC Original or Extra Crispy fried chicken for $10 via the app or online. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $6 Big Box
item.description: Get Popeyes' $6 Big Box including chicken, a side, and a biscuit — one of their best ongoing value offers. (Ongoing)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: New 'How Far You'll Mango' Smoothie — Disney Moana Collab
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-New 'How Far You'll Mango' S-2026-07-13
item.description: Limited-time Disney Moana-inspired 'How Far You'll Mango' smoothie now available at Tropical Smoothie Cafe locations nationwide. (Limited time)
